song.title: Steady My Heart
song.presentation: V1 P C1 C2 V2 P C1 C2 B C2 C1 C2 E
song.lyrics: [V1] . G 1) Wish it could be easy . Why is life so messy . C Why is pain a part of us| . G There are days I feel like . Nothing ever goes right . C Sometimes it just hurts so much [P] . Em But You're here . D You're real . C D I know I can trust You [C1] . G Even when it hurts . D Even when it's hard . Bm C Even when it all just falls apart| . G I will run to You . D Cause I know that You are . Bm C Lover of my soul Healer of my scars [C2] . G D You steady my heart . Em C You steady my heart --- [V2] . G 2) I'm not gonna worry . I know that You've got me . C Right inside the palm of Your hand| . G Each and every moment . What's good and right gets broken . C Happens just the way You plan [B] . G D And I will run to You . Em C I find refuge in Your arms . G D And I will sing to You . Em C Cause of everything You are [E] . G E) I'm not gonna worry . I know that You've got me . C Right inside the palm of Your hand|
